response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems work with compute/storage/hardware focus. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no cloud compute platform, C++ systems, or formal technical leadership experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers. Core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with the C++ infrastructure focus of this position.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across diverse domains and stacks
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput services (Sociomantic) and distributed deployments
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching through workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience — only a short C/C++ role at National Instruments
No demonstrated experience leading or architecting an internal cloud compute platform
No formal technical leadership title mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra leadership
Broad polyglot engineering and mentoring background
